message:
test: add 41 unit tests to loader.rs

loader.rs: 14→55 tests covering qualify_id (prefix addition, skip, case
insensitive), has_known_prefix, WorkspaceRepoConfig methods (is_enabled,
effective_name, effective_prefix, effective_beads_path), normalize_path,
relative_path_matches_pattern (wildcard, nested, exact, depth mismatch),
is_excluded_workspace_path, resolve_workspace_root, parse_issues_from_text
(valid, empty lines, BOM, malformed), load_issues_from_file edge cases
(BOM, empty lines, malformed), find_jsonl_path (backup skip, empty dir),
load_sprints (nonexistent, invalid), WorkspaceConfig::validate (empty,
disabled, empty path), and namespace_workspace_issues (comments, source_repo).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
